issue_title: Linkfy - cannot click on links, see html code in chat.
issue_body_preview:
Am I misunderstanding how the linkfyEnabled should work?   I was expecting to get a link I could click on in the chat window.  Instead I see html with the anchor tag.   I repeated this on your demo site.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/28730875/56605785-df92fb00-65d2-11e9-8287-
test_description_zh: 在聊天窗口中发送一条包含URL链接的消息（例如 https://www.google.com），观察消息气泡中链接的渲染效果，尝试点击该链接。
expected_result_zh: 聊天消息中的URL应被正确渲染为可点击的超链接，而不是显示原始HTML锚标签代码（如 <a href=...>）。点击链接后应能正常跳转到对应网址。
